message:
feat(mcp): MCP error code module with actionable hints

Add mcp_error.rs (gated behind #[cfg(feature = "mcp")]) defining 14
standardized error codes (FT-MCP-0001..0014) and McpToolError struct.
Provides map_caut_error(), map_cass_error(), and map_mcp_error()
helpers that translate internal errors into user-facing codes with
remediation hints (e.g. "Install caut and ensure it is on PATH").

lib.rs updated to export the new module under the mcp feature gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
